'''ây-sh-th''' ('''kayashath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monoski|monoski]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-sh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monoski|monoski]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-sh-th
|-
! Lemma
| kayashath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyashath|thiyashath]] || [[word:jiyashath|jiyashath]] || [[word:shiyashath|shiyashath]] || [[word:kiyashath|kiyashath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyashath|thuthuyashath]] || [[word:jujuyashath|jujuyashath]] || [[word:shushuyashath|shushuyashath]] || [[word:kukuyashath|kukuyashath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyashath|thuyashath]] || [[word:juyashath|juyashath]] || [[word:shuyashath|shuyashath]] || [[word:kuyashath|kuyashath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyashath|thuyashath]] || [[word:juyashath|juyashath]] || [[word:shuyashath|shuyashath]] || [[word:kuyashath|kuyashath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyashath|theyashath]] || [[word:jeyashath|jeyashath]] || [[word:sheyashath|sheyashath]] || [[word:keyashath|keyashath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyashath|thothoyashath]] || [[word:jojoyashath|jojoyashath]] || [[word:shoshoyashath|shoshoyashath]] || [[word:kokoyashath|kokoyashath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyashath|thoyashath]] || [[word:joyashath|joyashath]] || [[word:shoyashath|shoyashath]] || [[word:koyashath|koyashath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyashath|thoyashath]] || [[word:joyashath|joyashath]] || [[word:shoyashath|shoyashath]] || [[word:koyashath|koyashath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyashath|thĂŠyashath]] || [[word:jĂŠyashath|jĂŠyashath]] || [[word:shĂŠyashath|shĂŠyashath]] || [[word:kĂŠyashath|kĂŠyashath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayashath|thathayashath]] || [[word:jajayashath|jajayashath]] || [[word:shashayashath|shashayashath]] || [[word:kakayashath|kakayashath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayashath|thayashath]] || [[word:jayashath|jayashath]] || [[word:shayashath|shayashath]] || [[word:kayashath|kayashath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayashath|thayashath]] || [[word:jayashath|jayashath]] || [[word:shayashath|shayashath]] || [[word:kayashath|kayashath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayashath|shayashath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayashath|goshayashath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayashath|gokishayashath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayashathnĂŒ|shayashathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayashathnknĂŒ|goshayashathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayashathnĂŒ|gokishayashathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayashathshĂ«|shayashathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayashathnkshĂ«|goshayashathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayashathshĂ«|gokishayashathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayashathro|shayashathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayashathnkro|goshayashathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayashathro|gokishayashathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayashathmu|shayashathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayashathnkmu|goshayashathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayashathmu|gokishayashathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayashathsher|shayashathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayashathnksher|goshayashathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayashathsher|gokishayashathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayashathng|shayashathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayashathnkng|goshayashathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayashathng|gokishayashathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayashathya|shayashathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayashathnkya|goshayashathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayashathya|gokishayashathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayashathyam|shayashathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayashathnkyam|goshayashathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayashathyam|gokishayashathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayashathnĂŒshĂ«|shayashathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayashathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayashathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayashathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayashathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayashathnĂŒro|shayashathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayashathnknĂŒro|goshayashathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayashathnĂŒro|gokishayashathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayashathnĂŒmu|shayashathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayashathnknĂŒmu|goshayashathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayashathnĂŒmu|gokishayashathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayashathshĂ«nĂŒ|shayashathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayashathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayashathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayashathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayashathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayashathshĂ«ro|shayashathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayashathnkshĂ«ro|goshayashathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayashathshĂ«ro|gokishayashathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayashathshĂ«mu|shayashathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayashathnkshĂ«mu|goshayashathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayashathshĂ«mu|gokishayashathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayashathronĂŒ|shayashathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayashathnkronĂŒ|goshayashathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayashathronĂŒ|gokishayashathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayashathroshĂ«|shayashathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayashathnkroshĂ«|goshayashathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayashathroshĂ«|gokishayashathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayashathromu|shayashathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayashathnkromu|goshayashathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayashathromu|gokishayashathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayashathmunĂŒ|shayashathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayashathnkmunĂŒ|goshayashathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayashathmunĂŒ|gokishayashathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayashathmushĂ«|shayashathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayashathnkmushĂ«|goshayashathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayashathmushĂ«|gokishayashathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayashathmuro|shayashathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayashathnkmuro|goshayashathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayashathmuro|gokishayashathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
